# This is an auto-generated Django model module.
# You'll have to do the following manually to clean this up:
#   * Rearrange models' order
#   * Make sure each model has one field with primary_key=True
#   * Make sure each ForeignKey and OneToOneField has `on_delete` set to the desired behavior
#   * Remove `managed = False` lines if you wish to allow Django to create, modify, and delete the table
# Feel free to rename the models, but don't rename db_table values or field names.
from django.db import models


class AiUsage(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant = models.ForeignKey('Tenants', models.DO_NOTHING)
    year = models.IntegerField()
    month = models.IntegerField()
    used_count = models.IntegerField()

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'ai_usage'
        unique_together = (('tenant', 'year', 'month'),)
        db_table_comment = 'Monthly AI invoice extraction usage tracker per tenant'


class AmountTransactions(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    transaction_date = models.DateField()
    transaction_type = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    debit = models.DecimalField(max_digits=15, decimal_places=2)
    credit = models.DecimalField(max_digits=15, decimal_places=2)
    balance = models.DecimalField(max_digits=15, decimal_places=2)
    narration = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    ledger_id = models.BigIntegerField()
    ledger_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Ledger name (e.g., bank2, Cash, HDFC Bank)')
    sub_group_1 = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    voucher_id = models.BigIntegerField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'amount_transactions'


class Answers(models.Model):
    ledger_code = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    answer = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36, blank=True, null=True)
    sub_group_1_1 = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    sub_group_1_2 = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    question = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'answers'


class BankReconciliationLinks(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant = models.ForeignKey('Tenants', models.DO_NOTHING)
    bank_transaction = models.OneToOneField('BankStatementTransactions', models.DO_NOTHING, db_comment='FK to bank_statement_transactions')
    voucher_id = models.BigIntegerField(db_comment='FK to vouchers.id')
    reconciliation_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Date when reconciled')
    reconciliation_status = models.CharField(max_length=20, db_comment='Reconciled | Pending | Disputed')
    reconciliation_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, db_comment='automatic | manual')
    voucher_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    confidence_score = models.IntegerField()
    match_method = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    reconciled_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    cheque_number = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField()
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField()

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'bank_reconciliation_links'
